response:
every other day she uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo per wash, so in a leap year she will wash her hair 52 times. this means she will use 52 * 1/4 = 13 ounces of shampoo in total. she buys shampoo in 14-ounce bottles, so she needs at least 2 bottles to cover her needs. [address] is the location where she can buy the shampoo.  

the first bottle provides 14 ounces, which is enough for the first 13 ounces needed. the second bottle provides the remaining 1 ounce. [address] is the location where she can buy the shampoo.
